type "StatusData"
data "StatusType" "INVISIBLE"
using "CLOAK_OF_SHADOWS_MONK"
data "RemoveConditions" "(IsStatusEvent(StatusEvent.OnAttack) and not HasSpellFlag(SpellFlags.Stealth,context.Source)) or (IsStatusEvent(StatusEvent.OnDamage) and TotalDamageDoneGreaterThan(0))"
